assertions.text: Lists at least 2 distinct hypotheses for the root cause
assertions.evidence: Does not list distinct hypotheses. Goes directly to Root Cause Analysis without enumerating alternatives.

assertions.text: Proposes a diagnostic step or experiment before jumping to the final fix
assertions.evidence: Does not propose any diagnostic experiment or diagnostic step. Jumps directly to root cause identification.

assertions.text: Explains what evidence confirms the root cause before applying the fix
assertions.evidence: Explains closure capture and why the stale closure occurs.

assertions.text: Correctly identifies stale closure over the count variable as the root cause
assertions.evidence: Correctly identifies stale closure as the root cause.

assertions.text: Proposes using the functional updater form as the fix
assertions.evidence: Proposes the correct functional updater pattern.
